creator: nicholas.h.briggs@gmail.com
text:
Thanks Dmitry -- I have solved my immediate problem by applying your patch to the libexecinfo Makefile and rebuilding/reinstalling.

I've noticed the same failure message from emacs (from emacs-nox-27.1,3) startup, though it does not appear to affect its normal operation, and it is of course fixed with the rebuilt libexecinfo installed.
